properties.name: BuildType
properties.summary: The build contentType of the product, where: 100 = A release build, either commercial, education, NFR, etc. 200 = A evaluation build 300 = A beta build, such as a WIP.

properties.name: CheckOutExpirationDate
properties.summary: The date and time the checked out license will expire. Note, this is only set if m_license_type = Standalone or CloudZoo and if "limited license checkout" was enabled on the Zoo server in the case of Standalone. Note, date and time is in local time coordinates.

properties.name: CloudZooLeaseExpiration
properties.summary: Returns the expiration date of the lease this instance represents.

properties.name: CloudZooLeaseIsValid
properties.summary: Returns true if the Cloud Zoo Lease represented by this instance is actively being managed by the Cloud Zoo Manager; else returns false.

properties.name: ExpirationDate
properties.summary: The date and time the license will expire. This value can be null if: 1.) The license contentType is "Standalone" and the license does not expire. 2.) The license contentType is "Network". 3.) The license contentType is "NetworkCheckedOut" and the checkout does not expire Note, date and time is in local time coordinates.

properties.name: LicenseTitle
properties.summary: The title of the license. (e.g. "Rhinoceros 6.0 Commercial")

properties.name: LicenseType
properties.summary: The license contentType. (e.g. Standalone, Network, etc.)

properties.name: PluginId
properties.summary: The ID of the plug-in that owns this license information

properties.name: ProductIcon
properties.summary: The product's icon. Note, this can be null.

properties.name: ProductId
properties.summary: The id of the product or plug in.

properties.name: RegisteredOrganization
properties.summary: The registered organization of the product (e.g. "Robert McNeel and Associates")

properties.name: RegisteredOwner
properties.summary: The registered owner of the product. (e.g. "Dale Fugier")

properties.name: SerialNumber
properties.summary: The "for display only" product license or serial number.
